title: Upon A Delaying Lady
content:
Come, come away
Or let me go;
Must I here stay
Because you're slow,
And will continue so;
Troth, lady, no.

I scorn to be
A slave to state;
And since I'm free,
I will not wait,
Henceforth at such a rate,
For needy fate.

If you desire
My spark should glow,
The peeping fire
You must blow;
Or I shall quickly grow
To frost, or snow.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon A Delaying Lady"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
